seoTitle: Cassilis vs Castle Cove — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Cassilis vs Castle Cove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cassilis and Castle Cove.
heading: Cassilis vs Castle Cove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cassilis, New South Wales and Castle Cove, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cassilis has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Castle Cove (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cassilis or Castle Cove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cassilis has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Castle Cove scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cassilis scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Castle Cove scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cassilis or Castle Cove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cassilis has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
